name: Lucid Labs Dark
description: A professional dark theme for Visual Studio Code based on Lucid Labs brand guidelines. Features dark purple backgrounds, teal accents, and cloud-inspired aesthetics perfect for Azure development, PowerShell scripting, and enterprise coding.
